question_intent: Find the nationality of the constructor that had the most wins in races where the fastest lap was set by a driver from the United Kingdom

plan.question_intent: Find the nationality of the constructor that had the most wins in races where the fastest lap was set by a driver from the United Kingdom
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.nationality FROM races r JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid WHERE d.nationality = 'British' AND res.fastestlap IS NOT NULL AND cs.wins > 0 GROUP BY c.nationality ORDER BY SUM(cs.wins) DESC LIMIT 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
blocks.notes: Calculates the total wins for each constructor nationality where the fastest lap was set by a British driver

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Returns the nationality of the constructor with the most wins in races where the fastest lap was set by a British driver

build_logs.notes: Calculates the total wins for each constructor nationality where the fastest lap was set by a British driver

steps.clause: JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British') AND (res.fastestlap IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British') AND (res.position IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British') AND (res.position IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.wins > 0)
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.nationality, SUM(cs.wins) AS total_wins
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British') AND (res.position IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.wins > 0)
GROUP BY c.nationality

build_logs.notes: Returns the nationality of the constructor with the most wins in races where the fastest lap was set by a British driver

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.nationality, SUM(cs.wins) AS total_wins
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British') AND (res.position IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.wins > 0)
GROUP BY c.nationality) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT leaf_1.nationality
FROM (SELECT c.nationality, SUM(cs.wins) AS total_wins
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON res.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British') AND (res.position IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.wins > 0)
GROUP BY c.nationality) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points)
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid) AS leaf_1

question: What is the nationality of each constructor that has accumulated wins, considering only races where a British driver finished in a non-null position?
